assets.prompt_hint_zh: 第01集边境暴雪风格参考：低调高反差、冷白暴雪、黑石大暗面、旧铁、粗木、雪泥、冻血、暗红火点和真实火光动机。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Episode 01 border-blizzard style reference: low-key high contrast, cold white blizzard, massive blackstone shadow, old iron, rough wood, snow mud, frozen blood, dark red embers and motivated real firelight.

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 横屏构图和局部因果板，用于保持战场远景、身体代价近景、战场口令中近景三种不同光影比例下的空间连续性。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Landscape composition and local-causality board for preserving spatial continuity across three different lighting balances: battlefield wide shot, bodily-cost close shot, and battlefield-command close-medium shot.

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 锁喉关外墙序幕场景卡，锁定黑石墙、墙头警钟架、门闩、枪线、拒马和墙外攻城方向。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Suohou Gate outer wall scene card locking blackstone wall, wall-top bell frame, gate bar, spear line, barricades and exterior siege direction.

composition_layers.foreground: wall-top parapet and bell-side working space
composition_layers.midground: defenders, bell frame, gate mechanism and spear line
composition_layers.background: outer battlefield, barricades, siege pressure and mountains

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 骨钟、断矛、冻血、裂缝和残缺淡金旧日月刻痕的道具参考；不可当作视频首帧。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Prop reference for bone bell, broken spear, frozen blood, cracks and faint broken old sun-moon traces; not a video first frame.

composition_layers.foreground: bone bell surface, cracks, frozen blood and old mark details

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 薛临墙第01集边墙序幕状态卡：黑发束髻、短须、灰石厚衬袄、旧甲片、粗麻墙巾、冻裂手和低声实际命令状态。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Xue Linqiang episode 01 border prologue state card: tied black hair, short beard, grey padded coat, old armor plates, coarse wall scarf, cracked hands and practical low-command posture.

composition_layers.foreground: Xue Linqiang identity, face, hands and wardrobe material details

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 北境攻城剪影状态卡，只用于墙外兽族联盟远景、巨角、毛皮、盾面和火雪分离参考。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Northern siege silhouette state card, used only for exterior beast-alliance distance, horn, fur, shield and fire-snow separation reference.

conditioning.operator_note: Must be loaded as an image node. Prompt text mentioning E01_C020 is not enough for ComfyUI to use this image.

composition_layers.foreground: siege silhouette, horn and shield readability

assets.prompt_hint_zh: 年轻灰墙军户序幕状态卡，用于被撞门余震晃倒、半倒墙边、武器脱手、冻血和雪墙可读性；不可当作视频首帧。
assets.prompt_hint_en: Young grey-wall soldier prologue state card for aftershock collapse beside the wall, dropped weapon, frozen blood and snow-wall readability; not a video first frame.

composition_layers.foreground: young soldier identity, face, hands and blood-contact detail

assets.prompt_hint_zh: SC001-SH001 首帧：墙外攻城方向低机位正向偏斜，七成正向读城门压力、三成斜向给纵深；兽族/伴生兽、攻城车或破门猛犸压向同一面黑石城门，远处墙头小钟只是锚点。
assets.prompt_hint_en: SC001-SH001 first frame: low front-biased exterior siege angle, about seventy percent frontal gate pressure and thirty percent oblique depth; beast troops/companion beasts, siege cart or gate-breaking mammoth press toward the same blackstone gate, with the tiny wall-top bell only as an anchor.

composition_layers.foreground: front-biased low beast siege shoulders, torn banners, old iron shields, siege-cart beams, snow-mud footsteps and partial beast horn or mammoth form
composition_layers.midground: same blackstone wall and gate with frontal pressure and slight oblique depth
composition_layers.background: small wall-top bone bell and defender silhouettes, mountains, snow haze and distant firelines

output_format.minimum_resolution: 3840x2160 UHD minimum; 4096px long-edge target for cinematic reference frames
output_format.minimum_resolution_notes: 4K reference image standard: use 3840x2160 or higher for 16:9 plates; use 4096px long edge or higher for wider cinematic plates; never downsample canonical reference frames to preview resolution.
qc_checks: 4K reference-image precision: 3840x2160 UHD minimum or 4096px long-edge cinematic plate, with no preview-resolution downsampling
match the approved R001 texture standard: de-particleized, no yellow glitter or digital speckle, clear physical material separation

assets.texture_standard_source: 019eac75-d625-7291-bfd7-273ec630f1c3 latest fortress_battle_far_view_war_aged_clean_4k source image; canonical 01/assets/reference-frames/r001e01.png is the downstream texture standard.

assets.prompt_hint_zh: SC001-SH001 终帧：同一墙外方向的第一次重撞城门；攻城车木梁或铁包巨角撞门，雪雾亮部、门闩震动、同一墙头骨钟横摆，禁止越墙到背面。
assets.prompt_hint_en: SC001-SH001 last frame: first heavy gate impact from the same exterior direction; siege-cart beam or iron-wrapped horn hits the gate, snow-haze highlight, gate-bar shock and the same wall-top bone bell swinging, with no crossing behind the wall.

composition_layers.foreground: gate-impact snow blast, siege-cart beam or iron-wrapped horn, old timber, blackstone edge and low fire rim
composition_layers.midground: same blackstone gate, shaken bars, wall face and impact debris
composition_layers.background: same wall-top bell frame and bone bell swinging above or upper-side, small defender silhouettes and blizzard

assets.prompt_hint_zh: SC001-SH002 新首帧：同一墙头同一口钟旁，年轻军户被撞门余震晃倒，半倒墙边，武器脱手滑进雪泥，旁边骨钟横摆；旧徽只剩不可读断屑。
assets.prompt_hint_en: SC001-SH002 new first frame: beside the same wall-top bell, the young soldier is knocked down by the gate-impact aftershock, half-collapsed by the wall, weapon slipping into snow mud, same bone bell swinging beside him; the old mark remains only unreadable broken flecks.

composition_layers.foreground: dropped broken spear or spear shaft sliding through snow mud, bracing hand, snow and dark-red frozen blood edge
composition_layers.midground: young soldier half-collapsed beside blackstone parapet, shoulder and back against wall, face half hidden by helmet, scarf, shadow and blizzard
composition_layers.background: same bell frame and swinging bone bell, nearby defenders, exterior siege pressure, snow haze and low fire points

asset_metadata_warning: E01_R001-E01_R004 are generated 4K same-space SC001 candidate reference images and are synchronized with 01/art/asset-index.json and asset-manifest.json as generated_candidate_pending_user_qc. E01_R010-E01_R013 are high-score approved SC003 primary I2V reference frames for the current motion-test pass. E01_R014 is only an optional Canyangao blockade match target for later edit or approved FLF2V tail testing, not part of the current SC003 room I2V pass.
